mapper.select: SELECT TTR.ID AS testResultId, TT.TEST_TITLE AS testTitle, TT.TEST_DATE AS acquiredAt, NVL(TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS, 'none') AS certApplyStatus, CASE WHEN TCR.ID IS NULL THEN '미신청' WHEN TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS = 'processing' THEN '신청대기' WHEN TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS = 'completed' THEN '신청완료' ELSE '미신청' END AS certApplyStatusName, TCR.ID AS certRenewId, CASE WHEN TCR.ID IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS canApply, CASE WHEN TCR.ID IS NULL THEN '신청하기' WHEN TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS = 'processing' THEN '처리중' WHEN TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS = 'completed' THEN '완료' ELSE '신청하기' END AS buttonText FROM TBL_TEST_RESULT TTR JOIN TBL_TEST_APPLY TTA ON TTR.TEST_APPLY_ID = TTA.ID JOIN TBL_TEST TT ON TTA.TEST_ID = TT.ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TCR2.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY TCR2.TEST_RESULT_ID, TCR2.USER_ID ORDER BY TCR2.ID DESC ) AS rowNumber FROM TBL_CERT_RENEW TCR2 WHERE TCR2.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NVL(TCR2.CERT_RENEW_STATUS, 'processing') != 'cancelled' ) WHERE rowNumber = 1 ) TCR ON TTR.ID = TCR.TEST_RESULT_ID WHERE TTA.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TTR.TEST_RESULT_POINT >= 60 AND NVL(TT.TEST_IS_DELETED, 0) = 0 ORDER BY TT.TEST_DATE DESC, TTR.ID DESC

SELECT TTR.ID AS testResultId, TT.TEST_TITLE AS testTitle, TT.TEST_DATE AS acquiredAt, NVL(TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS, 'none') AS certApplyStatus, CASE WHEN TCR.ID IS NULL THEN '미신청' WHEN TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS = 'processing' THEN '신청대기' WHEN TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS = 'completed' THEN '신청완료' ELSE '미신청' END AS certApplyStatusName, TCR.ID AS certRenewId, CASE WHEN TCR.ID IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS canApply FROM TBL_TEST_RESULT TTR JOIN TBL_TEST_APPLY TTA ON TTR.TEST_APPLY_ID = TTA.ID JOIN TBL_TEST TT ON TTA.TEST_ID = TT.ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TCR2.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY TCR2.TEST_RESULT_ID, TCR2.USER_ID ORDER BY TCR2.ID DESC ) AS rowNumber FROM TBL_CERT_RENEW TCR2 WHERE TCR2.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NVL(TCR2.CERT_RENEW_STATUS, 'processing') != 'cancelled' ) WHERE rowNumber = 1 ) TCR ON TTR.ID = TCR.TEST_RESULT_ID WHERE TTA.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TTR.ID = #{testResultId} AND TTR.TEST_RESULT_POINT >= 60 AND NVL(TT.TEST_IS_DELETED, 0) = 0

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TES.EDU_ID) FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 ) AS courseCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_TEST_RESULT TTR JOIN TBL_TEST_APPLY TTA ON TTR.TEST_APPLY_ID = TTA.ID JOIN TBL_TEST TT ON TTA.TEST_ID = TT.ID WHERE TTA.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TTR.TEST_RESULT_POINT >= 60 AND NVL(TT.TEST_IS_DELETED, 0) = 0 ) AS certificateCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_TEST_RESULT TTR JOIN TBL_TEST_APPLY TTA ON TTR.TEST_APPLY_ID = TTA.ID JOIN TBL_TEST TT ON TTA.TEST_ID = TT.ID WHERE TTA.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TTR.TEST_RESULT_POINT >= 60 AND NVL(TT.TEST_IS_DELETED, 0) = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_CERT_RENEW TCR WHERE TCR.TEST_RESULT_ID = TTR.ID AND TCR.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NVL(TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS, 'processing') != 'cancelled' ) ) AS availableApplyCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_CERT_RENEW WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND CERT_RENEW_STATUS = 'processing' ) AS processingApplyCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_CERT_RENEW WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND CERT_RENEW_STATUS = 'completed' ) AS completedApplyCount FROM DUAL

SELECT TE.ID AS eduId, TE.EDU_TITLE AS eduTitle, TE.EDU_DETAIL AS eduDetail, NULL AS thumbnailUrl, MIN(TEV.EDU_VIDEO_URL) AS youtubeUrl, CASE WHEN COUNT(TEWM.ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(TEWM.ID)) * 100) END AS progressPercent, TO_CHAR(MIN(TES.EDU_START_AT), 'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(MIN(TES.EDU_START_AT), 12), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS studyPeriod FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM ON TE.ID = TEWM.EDU_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WORDS TW ON TEWM.WORDS_ID = TW.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_EDU_VIDEO TEV ON TW.EDU_VIDEO_ID = TEV.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS ON TEWM.ID = TWS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID AND TWS.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 GROUP BY TE.ID, TE.EDU_TITLE, TE.EDU_DETAIL ORDER BY MIN(TES.EDU_START_AT) DESC, TE.ID DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CERT_RENEW.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_CERT_RENEW ( ID, CERT_RENEW_CREATE_AT, TEST_RESULT_ID, USER_ID, CERT_RENEW_TYPE, CERT_RECEIVE_TYPE, CERT_NO, CERT_NAME, CERT_PHONE, CERT_ADDRESS, CERT_RENEW_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{id}, SYSDATE, #{testResultId}, #{userId}, #{certRenewType}, #{certReceiveType}, #{certNo}, #{certName}, #{certPhone}, #{certAddress}, 'processing' )

SELECT SEQ_CERT_RECEIVE_ADDRESS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_CERT_RECEIVE_ADDRESS ( ID, CERT_POSTCODE, CERT_ROAD_ADDRESS, CERT_JIBUN_ADDRESS, CERT_DETAIL_ADDRESS, CERT_ADDRESS, CERT_RECEIVE_ADDRESS_CREATE_AT, CERT_RENEW_ID ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{certPostcode}, #{certRoadAddress}, #{certJibunAddress}, #{certDetailAddress}, #{certAddress}, SYSDATE, #{certRenewId} )
mapper.select: SELECT TCR.ID AS certRenewId, TTR.ID AS testResultId, TT.TEST_TITLE AS testTitle, TT.TEST_DATE AS acquiredAt, TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS AS certApplyStatus, CASE WHEN TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS = 'processing' THEN '신청대기' WHEN TCR.CERT_RENEW_STATUS = 'completed' THEN '신청완료' ELSE '미신청' END AS certApplyStatusName, TCRA.CERT_POSTCODE AS certPostcode, TCRA.CERT_ROAD_ADDRESS AS certRoadAddress, TCRA.CERT_JIBUN_ADDRESS AS certJibunAddress, TCRA.CERT_DETAIL_ADDRESS AS certDetailAddress, TCRA.CERT_ADDRESS AS certAddress FROM TBL_CERT_RENEW TCR JOIN TBL_TEST_RESULT TTR ON TCR.TEST_RESULT_ID = TTR.ID JOIN TBL_TEST_APPLY TTA ON TTR.TEST_APPLY_ID = TTA.ID JOIN TBL_TEST TT ON TTA.TEST_ID = TT.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_CERT_RECEIVE_ADDRESS TCRA ON TCR.ID = TCRA.CERT_RENEW_ID WHERE TCR.ID = #{certRenewId} AND TCR.USER_ID = #{userId}
